situation: audit-2026-07-07-047 derived fix. SettingsPage.tsx debounced saveSettings (300ms setTimeout) had two bugs: (1) sendMessage .then() with no .catch — any background error silently swallowed, user sees '已自动保存' only on success but gets no feedback on failure; (2) stale closure — setTimeout callback captured the `settings` value from the effect's render cycle, not the latest. Rapid edits + unmount within 300ms could save an older snapshot. cp-guard triggered because SZ-PP-M-001/M-002/M-003 commits exist in opt-popup-1783215325 but are not yet merged to main.
action: Added latestSettingsRef (useRef<AppSettings>) synced via a dedicated useEffect on every settings change. Debounce callback now reads latestSettingsRef.current instead of the closed-over `settings`. Added .catch((err) => console.error(...)) to the sendMessage chain so failures are at least logged. Used case-104 direct-wt-commit escape hatch since cp-guard blocked opt-worktree.sh commit.
outcome_evidence: Commit 0f915ec on auto/opt-popup-1783215325, pushed to origin. Diff: +latestSettingsRef declaration, +sync useEffect, +.catch handler on saveSettings sendMessage. No other files touched.
next_suggestion: Next pending fix by severity: SZ-PP-M-005 (Auto-save debounce timer not flushed on unmount — last edit lost). Same file, same debounce block; can batch in next round if cp-guard clears after merge. Otherwise continue shizi popup medium-severity queue: SZ-PP-M-006 (all chrome.runtime.sendMessage calls lack timeout).

audit_findings.finding: Debounced saveSettings sendMessage had no .catch and captured stale `settings` via closure
audit_findings.remediation: Add latestSettingsRef + sync useEffect; add .catch to sendMessage chain
